title: Hua Hin、Prachuap Khiri Khan — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Hua Hin、Prachuap Khiri Khan的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Hua Hin是Prachuap Khiri Khan的一个城市，人口约100,000。A royal beach resort town with a relaxed atmosphere, golf courses, and a growing expat community, offering a quieter alternative to Pattaya and Phuket.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
